title: Senior Software Engineer - Flipkart - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Flipkart - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Flipkart in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Flipkart:
Flipkart is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart!
